titles.title: ジェオチャム シーズン2

data.title: Jochum Season 2
data.title_japanese: ジェオチャム シーズン2
data.synopsis: Second season of Jochum.

data.title: One Piece: Heroines
data.synopsis:
Go behind the runway as style icon Nami stars in a life-changing fashion show, observe wise Robin as she helps to decipher an ancient tablet with Koala and Sabo, watch as solemn Princess Vivi receives a love letter from an unexpected admirer, and check out Ghost Princess Perona's battle over the last bottle of wine with Zoro and Mihawk!

(Source: VIZ Media)

titles.title: I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen
斩神之凡尘神域 第2季

data.title: Zhan Shen: Fanchen Shenyu II
data.title_japanese: 斩神之凡尘神域 第2季
title_synonyms: I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen
data.synopsis:
After the Cangnan crisis was resolved, Lin Qiye completed the year-long Night Watchman training and assessment at Jinnan Mountain and became a formal Night Watchman. He then returned to Squad 136 and, together with his partners, embarked on a new battle against the Church of the Ancient Gods... A new Western evil god made his debut, and the pinnacle of humanity gathered in Cangnan, where a massive storm of disaster was quietly brewing.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Sanjiu Yinyu's (三九音域) novel, Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen (我在精神病院学斩神).

titles.title: ダンジョン＆テレビジョン

data.title: Dungeons & Television
data.title_japanese: ダンジョン＆テレビジョン
data.synopsis:
Once upon a time, when television broadcasting itself was an adventure.

The invention of the television has made it possible to broadcast any event, however it is still an era where swords and sorcery abound. It has come for the cameras to turn their lens towards the darkness of dungeons, previously only known to adventurers.

Fighting countless monsters and constant equipment problems, the camera-wielding adventurers continued on, hoping to broadcast the first live dungeon capture. What may await them ahead?

(Source: Official Youtube channel)

data.title: Honkaku Lemon Anime
data.synopsis: Commercials for Suntory's -196 brand of chuuhai.

data.title: Biao Ren Er
data.synopsis:
In the third year of the Daye era, unrest stirred on the frontier. Emperor Yang of Sui made a northern tour to intimidate the western borders. Entrusted by an old friend, the escort Dao Ma escorted the rebel leader Zhi Shilang to Chang'an to fulfill his ideal of saving the world from chaos. However, a single, hateful eye followed him closely. Past events and present crises surfaced; in this chaotic world, see how Dao Ma stirs up a bloody storm in the martial world!

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Xianzhe Xu's (许先哲) manhua of the same title.

titles.title: Candle in the Tomb: South Sea Tomb

data.title: Gui Chuideng: Nanhai Gui Xu
data.title_english: Candle in the Tomb: South Sea Tomb
data.synopsis:
Hu Bayi and his companions, commissioned by Professor Chen, travel to Coral Temple Island in the South China Sea and hire Ruan Hei and his apprentice to embark on the Trident to search for the Qin Emperor's Bone Mirror. After their adventure, they crash into Guixu, where they discover the ancient mirror within the shipwreck and learn that Ruan Hei is Duoling's enemy. While resting after their escape, a mysterious figure suddenly appears, wielding a club, approaching Uncle Ming, who is on night watch.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

data.title: Quanzhi Gaoshou 4
data.synopsis: Fourth season of Quanzhi Gaoshou.

data.title: Quanzhi Gaoshou 4
data.synopsis: Fourth season of Quanzhi Gaoshou.

titles.title: Hitori No Shita: The Outcast 6th Season

data.title: Yi Ren Zhi Xia 6
title_synonyms: Hitori No Shita: The Outcast 6th Season
data.synopsis:
Following the incident in Bi You Village, Zhang Chulan continues his investigation into Feng Baobao's origins, leading him to visit Lu Jin. From Lu Jin, Zhang Chulan obtains the list of the Thirty-Six Thieves and unexpectedly learns the reason for Jin Feng's abduction. To prevent Wu Gengsheng's collection from falling into the hands of thieves, the group begins their journey deeper into the Qinling Mountains.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Eyelid
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Eyelid by Lanndo featuring flower.

data.title: Yi Nian Yong Heng 4th Season
data.synopsis:
For the sake of all living beings, Bai Xiaochun is forced to engage in a final battle with Tongtian Daoist. With the old world shattered, the group is scattered across the Eternal Continent beyond the heavens. Here, Bai Xiaochun will face even greater challenges and more powerful enemies…

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Wu Dong Qian Kun 6th Season
data.synopsis:
Lin Dong and his friends venture into a dangerous ancient land to gain strength for the Hundred Dynasties War. He defeats his rival Lin Langtian, gains new skills, and saves his friend. After earning a spot in the final and winning again, he stops a plot from the Western Domain to take over the battlefield. In the end, Lin Dong becomes the champion and joins the prestigious Dao Sect.

(Source: WeTV)

(Source: Tatsunoko Production, translated)

titles.title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia

data.title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia

titles.title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia

data.title: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
Wu Sui Xinghe
data.synopsis:
Seeking his parents, the mountain youth Jiang Han embarks on a journey of cultivation. He accidentally activates the Celestial Beast Cauldron, a legacy left by his mother, and awakens supreme magical powers! From then on, he defies fate and changes his destiny! He battles heaven and earth! On the battlefield where the gods fell, he fights bloody battles against countless races, carving a path to the heavens with his mortal body! He vows to fight for a bright future for humanity!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yao Ye's (妖夜) web novel of the same title.
